summary: Iteration 14 testing completed successfully. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All 8 frontend tests passed (100%). The new mandatory login page gate is fully functional: full-page login form blocks all platform content until authentication, no guest access option exists, login/register flows work correctly, logout returns to login page, and cookie-based auth persistence works across page refreshes.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - cosmetic issue, charts still render correctly

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login with valid admin credentials returns user data and sets cookies
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with valid test user credentials returns user data
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/me without authentication returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/me with valid session returns current user
Backend: POST /api/auth/logout clears session cookies
Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates new user and returns user data
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with duplicate email returns 400
Backend: Session persists across multiple requests
Backend: Protected endpoints require authentication
Backend: Dashboard APIs accessible after login
Frontend: Login page (data-testid='login-page') displayed when not authenticated
Frontend: Login card (data-testid='login-card') visible with email/password inputs
Frontend: No 'Continue as Guest' or 'Skip' button exists - correct mandatory login
Frontend: Login error message (data-testid='login-error') displayed for wrong credentials
Frontend: Switch to register form (data-testid='switch-to-register') shows Name field
Frontend: Successful login redirects to dashboard with logout button visible
Frontend: All navigation tabs accessible after login (Dashboard, Options, Portfolio, Backtest, Replay, Social, Calendar, Settings)
Frontend: Logout (data-testid='logout-btn') returns to login page
Frontend: Auth persistence - user stays logged in after page refresh (cookie-based)
Frontend: Register flow creates new user and redirects to dashboard
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing (test_iter14_*, test_ui_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 mandatory login page gate fully functional. The AuthModal with 'Continue as Guest' was replaced by a full-page LoginPage component. Key data-testids: login-page, login-card, auth-email-input, auth-password-input, auth-submit-btn, login-error, switch-to-register, switch-to-login, register-name-input, logout-btn. Auth uses HTTP-only cookies (access_token + refresh_token) with samesite=lax, secure=false. The App component checks authLoading and user state after all hooks but before the main return JSX - if !user, it renders <LoginPage /> instead of the main app. All features from iterations 1-13 continue to work correctly after login.

mocked_apis.note: Trading Economics API and Tradovate API are mocked. All trading is simulated via PaperBroker.

auth_gate_logic.behavior: If authLoading, shows loading spinner. If !user, renders <LoginPage />. Otherwise renders main app.

logout_button.behavior: Calls logout() which clears cookies and sets user to false, returning to login page

no_guest_access.note: No 'Continue as Guest', 'Skip', or any guest-related buttons exist on login page

cookie_persistence.status: FULLY WORKING - user stays logged in after page refresh

backend_auth_endpoints.POST /api/auth/register: Creates user, returns user data, sets cookies
backend_auth_endpoints.GET /api/auth/me: Returns current user if authenticated, 401 otherwise
backend_auth_endpoints.POST /api/auth/refresh: Refreshes access token using refresh token
